The '''Mission to Ruhe''' was a mission near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to lay siege to [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] citadel on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruhe]].

==The mission==
{{Quote|The repairs took a shorter time then we thought.|Anonymous [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]|<ref name="Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special">[[Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special]]</ref>}}
Upon entering the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] carrying the strike team led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was shot down. The craft skidded across the ground and smashed the gun turrets and front side. [[Jenks (clone trooper)|Jenks]] and the [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] claimed it would take days to repair.

The strike team continued to trek through the forest on [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeder]] bikes. Another ambush took place, in which a number of speeders were shot down.

While [[Jenks (clone trooper)|Jenks]] and the other [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] remained in the area repairing the gunship, the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] penetrated Dooku's citadel, where they realized the entire mission was a trap. Hundreds of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] remained waiting for them. The army opened fire, and pinned them down on a landing pad extending from the top floor outside.

The LAAT/i, with its engines repaired, flew in and covered the two Jedi while they boarded the landing craft. The mission was a failure for the Republic. Aboard the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in orbit, Obi-Wan and Anakin received their next assignment to [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]].
